system.notes:
Type: Pain Negation · Strength (drug power rating, design system pg.124): +2 · Difficulty (to synthesize): 5 · Cost: 250eb · Duration: 1D6+1 turns.

Designed as a combat drug and painkiller, endorphins reduce pain and stress effects. 'Dorph allows you to reduce the effects of stun or shock. 'Dorph also has a nasty cost in nervous system damage. Each time you use 'Dorph, roll an additional 1D10. On a 1, you have lost 1 point of REF — permanently.

Wiring note (Cyberpunk 2020 2nd ed. pg.123): mapped via the Effects Table (pg.124) — “Negate Pain Effects (+Strength to Stun Saves)” at Strength 2 → +2 to Stun Saves. Duration is in combat TURNS, so the round-tick timer counts it down. The 1-in-10 permanent REF loss per use is GM-run prose (not auto-applied). Manufacturer: not printed.

mechDrug.note: Painkiller / combat drug: +2 to Stun Saves (Effects Table, Strength 2).
